title: Palladium ingest brief
description: Standardized input for orchestrated catalog ingest. See docs/ingest/orchestrator.md.

id.description: Stable slug for run state under src/data/source/ingest-briefs/runs/<id>/

pass.description: A or B only, or AB for phased Pass A then Pass B on the same page range in one run.

genre.description: Required for most content types; omit only when the playbook does not use gameSystems (e.g. talents).

path.description: Repo-relative path to PDF under src/data/reference/ (gitignored).

reference.description: Printed book title for sources[] prose.

scope.description: Overrides playbook default scope for this pass.

options.description: Content-type-specific fields (category, school, audience, table, section, bookFile, etc.).

items.description: Optional pre-listed row names. Agent fills during review when empty.

batchSizeOverride.description: Smaller Pass A batches when rows are heavy (prerequisites, rituals, variants).

batchSizeOverrideB.description: Smaller Pass B batches when pass is AB (defaults to playbook Pass B size).

passBAfterRulings.description: When pass is AB: pause after all Pass A batches if any open Pass A rulings remain (do not start Pass B until user resolves).

linkedBriefs.description: Other brief ids to coordinate in the same session (e.g. race + Shadow O.C.C.).

updateExisting.description: True when correcting rows already in catalog.

sandboxOutput.description: Repo-relative path for test ingest output (JSON array). When set, do not write to src/data/content/ — write only here for comparison runs.
